name: Clive 'N' Wrench
short_description: Hop, spin, and time-travel your way through 11 vibrant worlds in this lovingly crafted 3D platformer. Join Clive the rabbit and Wrench the monkey on his back as they chase an evil genius across history to save the future. And yes, it all unfolds from the chilly cockpit of a 1950s refrigerator.
detailed_description:
When mad scientist Dr. Daucus steals top-secret time travel blueprints, it’s up to Clive and his sidekick Wrench to jump through history and stop him before the timeline unravels completely. Your ride is a time-traveling refrigerator, and your mission is to jump, double-jump, roll, twirl, and glide through a wild ride of nostalgic 3D platforming adventure.

11 WORLDS. ALL OF HISTORY

Leap from the icy cliffs of the Ice Age to the sandy ruins of Ancient Egypt. Explore 11 unique time-themed worlds filled with challenges, quirky characters, and hidden collectibles. Ancient Stones, lost pocket watches, and scattered keys are waiting for curious players to discover.

OLD-SCHOOL MOVES WITH MODERN FLOW

Clive brings athletic parkour skills, and Wrench adds power and stretch. Master their full move set to scale tricky towers, dodge traps, and take on foes from across time. Learn the flow of movement and find hidden shortcuts as you improve your runs.

CELEBRATING A CLASSIC GENRE

Clive 'N' Wrench is a heartfelt revival of the 3D collect-a-thon platformers from the N64 and PS1 era. Created by a lifelong fan of the genre over more than a decade, it brings together era-hopping level design, fluid movement, and a playful sense of discovery.

Features

  • Embark on a full 3D platforming adventure across 11 time-hopping worlds

  • Collect Pocket Watches, Keys, and Ancient Stones hidden throughout each level

  • Master agile parkour moves like wall jumps, flips, and the powerful Chimp Chopper

  • Meet a cast of eccentric heroes and villains pulled from across history

  • Conquer challenging boss battles and enjoy a nostalgic retro atmosphere

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
